title: TNT Every 5 Seconds
description: A simple Fabric mod that spawns primed TNT on every player every 5 seconds.
body:
TNT Storm is a lightweight Fabric mod that creates chaos by spawning primed TNT at every player's position every 5 seconds.

## Features:
- Automatically spawns primed TNT (already ignited)
- Uses vanilla default TNT fuse
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
- Server-side logic
- Affects all online players
- Simple and lightweight

## Optional command support:
- /tntstorm start
- /tntstorm stop
- /tntstorm setinterval **<seconds>**

Perfect for chaos challenges, minigames, and cursed survival worlds.
